tasks.title: Daily Rotator Cuff Stretching Reminder
tasks.notes: Warm-up with pendulums, then cross-body stretch and doorway chest stretch. Finish feeling loose, not sore. Check the Gemini stretching advice notes for detailed instructions.

tasks.title: Morning Stretching - Pendulums & Cross-Body Stretch
tasks.notes: Warm-up with pendulums first, then cross-body stretch. Don't overdo it - finish feeling loose, not sore.

tasks.title: Evening Stretching - Doorway Chest & Sleeper Stretches
tasks.notes: Doorway chest stretch to open joint space. Sleeper stretch for deeper work. Stop if any sharp pain.

tasks.title: Weekly Stretching Progress Check & Notes
tasks.notes: Review progress, note any improvements in range of motion. Remember: if more sore the next morning, scale back. Stay consistent but gentle! Check with your physical therapist about progression if needed.
